title: Trusted Players
description:
This minecraft mod lets you trust players, when you have them trusted you can't hit them, if you don't have them trusted you can hit them.

There is a bug that needs to be fixed, if you have menu blur enabled, it will blur the gui of the mod.
body: This mod can let you trust players. Trusting a player makes it so you cant hit them. Untrusting them does the opposite. Default keybind is 9, you can change it in your controls.
